mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PUSH_TOKENS (USER_ID, PLATFORM, TOKEN, IS_ACTIVE, LAST_SEEN_AT) VALUES (#{userId}, #{platform}, #{token}, #{isActive}, #{lastSeenAt})
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT WM.WORKPLACE_ID, W.NAME AS WORKPLACE_NAME, WM.USER_ID, PT.TOKEN FROM WORKPLACE_MEMBERS WM INNER JOIN WORKPLACES W ON W.ID = WM.WORKPLACE_ID INNER JOIN WORKPLACE_SETTINGS WS ON WS.WORKPLACE_ID = WM.WORKPLACE_ID INNER JOIN PUSH_TOKENS PT ON PT.USER_ID = WM.USER_ID AND PT.IS_ACTIVE = 1 LEFT JOIN ATTENDANCE_RECORDS AR ON AR.WORKPLACE_ID = WM.WORKPLACE_ID AND AR.USER_ID = WM.USER_ID AND AR.WORK_DATE = CURDATE() AND AR.CHECK_IN_AT IS NOT NULL WHERE WM.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND WM.ROLE IN ('STAFF', 'MANAGER') AND WS.DEFAULT_CHECK_IN_TIME IS NOT NULL AND DATE_FORMAT(WS.DEFAULT_CHECK_IN_TIME, '%H:%i') = #{targetTime} AND AR.ID IS NULL

SELECT DISTINCT WM.WORKPLACE_ID, W.NAME AS WORKPLACE_NAME, WM.USER_ID, PT.TOKEN FROM WORKPLACE_MEMBERS WM INNER JOIN WORKPLACES W ON W.ID = WM.WORKPLACE_ID INNER JOIN WORKPLACE_SETTINGS WS ON WS.WORKPLACE_ID = WM.WORKPLACE_ID INNER JOIN PUSH_TOKENS PT ON PT.USER_ID = WM.USER_ID AND PT.IS_ACTIVE = 1 INNER JOIN ATTENDANCE_RECORDS AR ON AR.WORKPLACE_ID = WM.WORKPLACE_ID AND AR.USER_ID = WM.USER_ID AND AR.WORK_DATE = CURDATE() AND AR.CHECK_IN_AT IS NOT NULL AND AR.CHECK_OUT_AT IS NULL WHERE WM.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND WM.ROLE IN ('STAFF', 'MANAGER') AND WS.DEFAULT_CHECK_OUT_TIME IS NOT NULL AND DATE_FORMAT(WS.DEFAULT_CHECK_OUT_TIME, '%H:%i') = #{targetTime}

SELECT DISTINCT SU.NAME AS STAFF_NAME, PT.ID AS PUSH_TOKEN_ID, WMM.USER_ID AS OWNER_USER_ID, PT.TOKEN FROM WORKPLACE_MEMBERS WM INNER JOIN USERS SU ON SU.ID = WM.USER_ID INNER JOIN WORKPLACE_MEMBERS WMM ON WM.WORKPLACE_ID = WMM.WORKPLACE_ID AND WMM.ROLE = 'OWNER' AND WMM.RECEIVE_ATTENDANCE_PUSH = 1 AND WMM.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' INNER JOIN PUSH_TOKENS PT ON PT.USER_ID = WMM.USER_ID AND PT.IS_ACTIVE = 1 WHERE WM.WORKPLACE_ID = #{workplaceId} AND WM.USER_ID = #{userId} AND WM.STATUS = 'ACTIVE'
